encounter.reason: Hypertension follow-up; intermittent palpitations (atrial fibrillation discovered)
encounter.location: Minnehaha Internal Medicine, 3501 East Lake Street, Minneapolis, MN 55406

conditions.name: atrial fibrillation, new onset
conditions.note: Discovered on examination (irregularly irregular pulse) and confirmed by in-office 12-lead ECG. Ventricular rate 92 bpm. Symptoms of palpitations and exertional dyspnea over 6-8 weeks consistent with atrial fibrillation.

conditions.name: essential hypertension
conditions.note: BP slightly elevated today at 138/86. Continue lisinopril 10 mg daily.

conditions.name: hyperlipidemia
conditions.note: Stable, diet-managed. Will address at next scheduled wellness visit.

medications.name: lisinopril 10 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 1 tablet by mouth once daily

medications.name: fish oil 1000 mg oral capsule
medications.sig: Take 1 capsule by mouth once daily

document_references.description: Detailed encounter note documenting hypertension follow-up with incidental discovery of intermittent palpitations over 6-8 weeks. Documents physical exam findings including irregularly irregular pulse, in-office 12-lead ECG interpretation confirming atrial fibrillation with ventricular rate 92 bpm, new diagnosis of atrial fibrillation, labs ordered (TSH, CBC, CMP), TTE ordered, patient education on AF, and return precautions.

In-office 12-lead ECG tracing performed on 2026-01-12 showing atrial fibrillation with ventricular rate 92 bpm, normal axis, no ST-segment changes, no pathologic Q waves, no bundle branch block, normal QTc interval.

diagnostic_reports.description: In-office 12-lead ECG performed and interpreted by Dr. Whitfield. Findings: atrial fibrillation with ventricular rate of 92 bpm, normal axis, no ST-segment changes, no pathologic Q waves, no bundle branch block, normal QTc interval. No prior ECG on file for comparison.
TSH ordered to rule out thyroid dysfunction as a precipitant of new-onset atrial fibrillation. Specimen drawn at this visit; results pending.
CBC with differential ordered as part of new-onset atrial fibrillation workup. Specimen drawn at this visit; results pending.
Comprehensive metabolic panel ordered as part of new-onset atrial fibrillation workup. Specimen drawn at this visit; results pending.
